rule.description: Grouping for Cortex XDR JSON logs.
Cortex XDR alert received. Severity: $(severity). Name: $(name). Host: $(host_name).
Cortex XDR audit management event. Severity: $(AUDIT_SEVERITY). Entity: $(AUDIT_ENTITY). Subtype: $(AUDIT_ENTITY_SUBTYPE).
Cortex XDR audit agent event. Severity: $(SEVERITY). Endpoint: $(ENDPOINTNAME). Type: $(TYPE). Subtype: $(SUBTYPE).
